name: Marcus Wellington
title: Chief Executive Officer & Head of Investments
bio: Visionary leader with 28 years in alternative asset management. Co-founded Bastion and transformed it into a premier global alternative investor managing $55B in AUM across multiple asset classes. Expert in long-term value creation strategies.

name: Victoria Chen
title: Chief Investment Officer
bio: Leads all investment strategy and portfolio decisions across corporate credit, asset-based finance, and real estate. 22 years of investment experience with track record of delivering superior risk-adjusted returns.

name: Richard Pembroke
title: Head of Equity Research
bio: Directs equity research team of 35+ analysts covering 2,000+ global companies. Drives fundamental research that informs portfolio construction and identifies compelling investment opportunities.

name: Amelia Rodriguez
title: Senior Portfolio Manager - Fixed Income
bio: Manages $12B corporate credit portfolio with focus on investment-grade and high-yield bonds. 19 years of credit analysis expertise and consistent alpha generation for Bastion investors.

name: James Nakamura
title: Portfolio Manager - Asset Finance
bio: Oversees $10B in asset-based finance investments with concentration in infrastructure and equipment leasing. Known for disciplined value-focused approach and multi-decade track record of outperformance.

name: Sophie Bergström
title: Head of Alternative Strategies
bio: Leads hedge fund and structured finance strategy teams. 24 years experience in complex securities and alternative investments. Responsible for $17B in AUM across Bastion's alternative platforms.

name: Daniel O'Brien
title: Managing Director - Private Equity
bio: Directs private equity investment team with focus on mid-market buyouts and growth capital. Engineered portfolio returns averaging 18% IRR over 15-year tenure at Bastion.

name: Priya Patel
title: Equity Analyst - Technology Sector
bio: Senior analyst covering technology and digital transformation investments. Deep expertise in software, semiconductors, and cloud infrastructure with proprietary research capabilities at Bastion.

name: Thomas Harris
title: Fixed Income Analyst - Structured Credit
bio: Specializes in complex structured credit and distressed debt analysis. 16 years of experience identifying opportunities in high-yield and distressed credit markets for Bastion strategies.

name: Katarina Novak
title: Risk Manager
bio: Oversees enterprise risk management and portfolio risk metrics across all Bastion strategies. PhD in Financial Engineering with expertise in VaR, stress testing, and derivative pricing.
